revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is a typing aid that creates a formatted shortcut to [[Wikipedia:Citation templates]]. When used, it should never be escaped like {{code|<nowiki>{{tl|cite xxx}}</nowiki>}}.
{{Citation Style 1}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{Template disambiguation}} <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
This template is a typing aid that creates a formatted shortcut to [[Wikipedia:Citation templates]]. When used, it should never be escaped like {{code|<nowiki>{{tl|cite xxx}}</nowiki>}}.
{{Citation Style 1}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{Template disambiguation}} <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_xxx%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_xxx%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->

This template is a typing aid that creates a formatted shortcut to [[Wikipedia:Citation templates]]. When used, it should never be escaped like {{code|<nowiki>{{tl|cite xxx}}</nowiki>}}.

{{Citation Style 1}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
{{Template disambiguation}}
<!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Documentation assistance templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
